mappings.rationale: Directly covers drug classification, drug action mechanisms, absorption/distribution/metabolism/excretion, and drugs directed against disease organisms as outlined in section C.
Addresses the organic chemicals participating in life processes including carbohydrates, lipids, proteins, ATP, nucleic acids, and enzymes.
Directly covers enzymes, a major category of organic chemicals in the vital processes outlined in this section.
Directly addresses hormones of vertebrates, invertebrates, and plants, including the relationship between endocrine and neural regulation.
Covers the molecular structures of carbohydrates, lipids, proteins, nucleic acids, and other organic chemicals central to vital processes.
Covers the chemistry of organic molecules including alkaloids, steroids, terpenes, and other natural products listed in this section.
Addresses DNA and RNA structure and function, nucleic acids as chemicals central to vital processes.
Covers vitamins and essential nutrients, major categories of chemicals participating in vital processes.
Provides the chemical thermodynamics and kinetics underlying ATP as the major carrier of chemical energy in biological systems.
Directly relevant to drug use and abuse, the nature of drug addiction and dependence as outlined in section C.7.
